    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterneCirconstances.nullFlavor">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterneCirconstances.realmCode">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.realmCode"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of realm-specific constraints. The value of this attribute identifies the realm in question"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.realmCode"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CS"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterneCirconstances.typeId">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.typeId"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of constraints defined in an HL7-specified message type. This might be a common type (also known as CMET in the messaging communication environment), or content included within a wrapper. The value of this attribute provides a unique identifier for the type in question."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.typeId"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/II"/>
      </type>
      <constraint>
        <key value="II-1"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human
               value="An II instance must have either a root or an nullFlavor."/>
        <expression value="root.exists() or nullFlavor.exists()"/>
        <source
                value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/InfrastructureRoot"/>
      </constraint>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterneCirconstances.typeId.nullFlavor">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.typeId.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterneCirconstances.typeId.assigningAuthorityName">
      <path
            value="Procedure.entryRelationship.typeId.assigningAuthorityName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Assigning Authority Name"/>
      <definition
                  value="A human readable name or mnemonic for the assigning authority. The Assigning Authority Name has no computational value. The purpose of a Assigning Authority Name is to assist an unaided human interpreter of an II value to interpret the authority. Note: no automated processing must depend on the assigning authority name to be present in any form."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.assigningAuthorityName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterneCirconstances.typeId.displayable">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.typeId.displayable"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Displayable"/>
      <definition
                  value="Specifies if the identifier is intended for human display and data entry (displayable = true) as opposed to pure machine interoperation (displayable = false)."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.displayable"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterneCirconstances.typeId.root">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.typeId.root"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Root"/>
      <definition value="Identifies the type as an HL7 Registered model"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.root"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/oid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/uuid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ruid"/>
      </type>
      <fixedString value="2.16.840.1.113883.1.3"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterneCirconstances.typeId.extension">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.typeId.extension"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Extension"/>
      <definition
                  value="A character string as a unique identifier within the scope of the identifier root."/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.extension"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterneCirconstances.templateId">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.templateId"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of a set of template-defined constraints. The value of this attribute provides a unique identifier for the templates in question"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.templateId"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/II"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterneCirconstances.typeCode">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.typeCode"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="EntryRelationship.typeCode"/>
        <min value="1"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <patternCode value="COMP"/>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://terminology.hl7.org/ValueSet/v3-xActRelationshipEntryRelationship"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterneCirconstances.inversionInd">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.inversionInd"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="The entryRelationship.inversionInd can be set to &quot;true&quot; to indicate that the relationship should be interpreted as if the roles of the source and target entries were reversed."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="EntryRelationship.inversionInd"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
      <patternBoolean value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterneCirconstances.contextConductionInd">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.contextConductionInd"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="The entryRelationship.contextConductionInd differs from the otherwise common use of this attribute in that in all other cases where this attribute is used, the value is fixed at &quot;true&quot;, whereas here the value is defaulted to &quot;true&quot;, and can be changed to &quot;false&quot; when referencing an entry in the same document. Setting the context conduction to false when referencing an entry in the same document keeps clear the fact that the referenced object retains its original context."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="EntryRelationship.contextConductionInd"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
      <defaultValueBoolean value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterneCirconstances.negationInd">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.negationInd"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="EntryRelationship.negationInd"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>

             id="Procedure.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterneMotifActe.typeCode">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.typeCode"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>

    <element
             id="Procedure.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterneMotifActe.inversionInd">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.inversionInd"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="The entryRelationship.inversionInd can be set to &quot;true&quot; to indicate that the relationship should be interpreted as if the roles of the source and target entries were reversed."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="EntryRelationship.inversionInd"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>

        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
      <patternBoolean value="false"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterneMotifActe.contextConductionInd">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.contextConductionInd"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="The entryRelationship.contextConductionInd differs from the otherwise common use of this attribute in that in all other cases where this attribute is used, the value is fixed at &quot;true&quot;, whereas here the value is defaulted to &quot;true&quot;, and can be changed to &quot;false&quot; when referencing an entry in the same document. Setting the context conduction to false when referencing an entry in the same document keeps clear the fact that the referenced object retains its original context."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="EntryRelationship.contextConductionInd"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
      <defaultValueBoolean value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterneMotifActe.negationInd">

      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>

        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>

      <type>

      <sliceName value="frReferenceInterneDM"/>

      <definition value="Référence interne à un DM"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>

        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>

    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterneDM.nullFlavor">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterneDM.realmCode">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.realmCode"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of realm-specific constraints. The value of this attribute identifies the realm in question"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.realmCode"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CS"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterneDM.typeId">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.typeId"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of constraints defined in an HL7-specified message type. This might be a common type (also known as CMET in the messaging communication environment), or content included within a wrapper. The value of this attribute provides a unique identifier for the type in question."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.typeId"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/II"/>
      </type>
      <constraint>
        <key value="II-1"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human
               value="An II instance must have either a root or an nullFlavor."/>
        <expression value="root.exists() or nullFlavor.exists()"/>
        <source
                value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/InfrastructureRoot"/>
      </constraint>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterneDM.typeId.nullFlavor">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.typeId.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterneDM.typeId.assigningAuthorityName">
      <path
            value="Procedure.entryRelationship.typeId.assigningAuthorityName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Assigning Authority Name"/>
      <definition
                  value="A human readable name or mnemonic for the assigning authority. The Assigning Authority Name has no computational value. The purpose of a Assigning Authority Name is to assist an unaided human interpreter of an II value to interpret the authority. Note: no automated processing must depend on the assigning authority name to be present in any form."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.assigningAuthorityName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterneDM.typeId.displayable">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.typeId.displayable"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Displayable"/>
      <definition
                  value="Specifies if the identifier is intended for human display and data entry (displayable = true) as opposed to pure machine interoperation (displayable = false)."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.displayable"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>

    <element
             id="Procedure.entryRelationship:frSimpleObservationDifficulte.nullFlavor">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>

        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.entryRelationship:frSimpleObservationDifficulte.realmCode">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.realmCode"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of realm-specific constraints. The value of this attribute identifies the realm in question"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.realmCode"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CS"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.entryRelationship:frSimpleObservationDifficulte.typeId">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.typeId"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of constraints defined in an HL7-specified message type. This might be a common type (also known as CMET in the messaging communication environment), or content included within a wrapper. The value of this attribute provides a unique identifier for the type in question."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.typeId"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/II"/>
      </type>
      <constraint>
        <key value="II-1"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human
               value="An II instance must have either a root or an nullFlavor."/>
        <expression value="root.exists() or nullFlavor.exists()"/>
        <source
                value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/InfrastructureRoot"/>
      </constraint>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.entryRelationship:frSimpleObservationDifficulte.typeId.nullFlavor">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.typeId.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>

      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.entryRelationship:frSimpleObservationDifficulte.typeId.assigningAuthorityName">
      <path
            value="Procedure.entryRelationship.typeId.assigningAuthorityName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Assigning Authority Name"/>
      <definition
                  value="A human readable name or mnemonic for the assigning authority. The Assigning Authority Name has no computational value. The purpose of a Assigning Authority Name is to assist an unaided human interpreter of an II value to interpret the authority. Note: no automated processing must depend on the assigning authority name to be present in any form."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.assigningAuthorityName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.entryRelationship:frSimpleObservationDifficulte.typeId.displayable">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.typeId.displayable"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Displayable"/>
      <definition
                  value="Specifies if the identifier is intended for human display and data entry (displayable = true) as opposed to pure machine interoperation (displayable = false)."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.displayable"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>

             id="Procedure.entryRelationship:frSimpleObservationDifficulte.typeId.root">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.typeId.root"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>

      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.root"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/oid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/uuid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ruid"/>
      </type>
      <fixedString value="2.16.840.1.113883.1.3"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.entryRelationship:frSimpleObservationDifficulte.typeId.extension">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.typeId.extension"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Extension"/>
      <definition
                  value="A character string as a unique identifier within the scope of the identifier root."/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.extension"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.entryRelationship:frSimpleObservationDifficulte.templateId">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.templateId"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of a set of template-defined constraints. The value of this attribute provides a unique identifier for the templates in question"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.templateId"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>

             id="Procedure.entryRelationship:frSimpleObservationDifficulte.typeCode">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.typeCode"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>

        <max value="1"/>
      </base>

        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <patternCode value="COMP"/>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://terminology.hl7.org/ValueSet/v3-xActRelationshipEntryRelationship"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.entryRelationship:frSimpleObservationDifficulte.inversionInd">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.inversionInd"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="The entryRelationship.inversionInd can be set to &quot;true&quot; to indicate that the relationship should be interpreted as if the roles of the source and target entries were reversed."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="EntryRelationship.inversionInd"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
      <patternBoolean value="false"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.entryRelationship:frSimpleObservationDifficulte.contextConductionInd">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.contextConductionInd"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="The entryRelationship.contextConductionInd differs from the otherwise common use of this attribute in that in all other cases where this attribute is used, the value is fixed at &quot;true&quot;, whereas here the value is defaulted to &quot;true&quot;, and can be changed to &quot;false&quot; when referencing an entry in the same document. Setting the context conduction to false when referencing an entry in the same document keeps clear the fact that the referenced object retains its original context."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="EntryRelationship.contextConductionInd"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
      <defaultValueBoolean value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.entryRelationship:frSimpleObservationDifficulte.negationInd">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.negationInd"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>

      <max value="1"/>

        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>

      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.templateId"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of a set of template-defined constraints. The value of this attribute provides a unique identifier for the templates in question"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.templateId"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/II"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.entryRelationship:frSimpleObservationScores.typeCode">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.typeCode"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="EntryRelationship.typeCode"/>
        <min value="1"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <patternCode value="COMP"/>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://terminology.hl7.org/ValueSet/v3-xActRelationshipEntryRelationship"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.entryRelationship:frSimpleObservationScores.inversionInd">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.inversionInd"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="The entryRelationship.inversionInd can be set to &quot;true&quot; to indicate that the relationship should be interpreted as if the roles of the source and target entries were reversed."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="EntryRelationship.inversionInd"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
      <patternBoolean value="false"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.entryRelationship:frSimpleObservationScores.contextConductionInd">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.contextConductionInd"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="The entryRelationship.contextConductionInd differs from the otherwise common use of this attribute in that in all other cases where this attribute is used, the value is fixed at &quot;true&quot;, whereas here the value is defaulted to &quot;true&quot;, and can be changed to &quot;false&quot; when referencing an entry in the same document. Setting the context conduction to false when referencing an entry in the same document keeps clear the fact that the referenced object retains its original context."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="EntryRelationship.contextConductionInd"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
      <defaultValueBoolean value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.entryRelationship:frSimpleObservationScores.negationInd">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.negationInd"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="EntryRelationship.negationInd"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.entryRelationship:frSimpleObservationScores.sequenceNumber">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.sequenceNumber"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="EntryRelationship.sequenceNumber"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/INT"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element

      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>

      <base>

        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>

              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/Encounter"/>

    <element

      <base>

        <profile

      <base>

        <max value="*"/>

      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-namespace">
        <valueUri value="urn:hl7-org:sdtc"/>
      </extension>
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-name">
        <valueString value="precondition2"/>
      </extension>
      <path value="Procedure.sdtcPrecondition2"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>

        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>

              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/Precondition2"/>

      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-namespace">
        <valueUri value="urn:hl7-org:sdtc"/>
      </extension>

                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-name">
        <valueString value="inFulfillmentOf1"/>
      </extension>

      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>

        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>

  </snapshot>
  <differential>
    <element id="Procedure">
      <path value="Procedure"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.templateId">
      <path value="Procedure.templateId"/>
      <slicing>
        <discriminator>
          <type value="value"/>
          <path value="root"/>
        </discriminator>
        <rules value="open"/>
      </slicing>
      <min value="2"/>
      <max value="4"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.templateId:iheProcedureEntry">
      <path value="Procedure.templateId"/>
      <sliceName value="iheProcedureEntry"/>
      <short value="Conformité Procedure Entry (IHE PCC)"/>
      <definition value="Conformité Procedure Entry (IHE PCC)"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.templateId:iheProcedureEntry.root">
      <path value="Procedure.templateId.root"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <patternString value="1.3.6.1.4.1.19376.1.5.3.1.4.19"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.templateId:ccdPlanOfCareActivityPlanned">
      <path value="Procedure.templateId"/>
      <sliceName value="ccdPlanOfCareActivityPlanned"/>
      <short value="Conformité Plan of care activity (CCD) si acte prévu "/>
      <definition
                  value="Conformité Plan of care activity (CCD) si acte prévu"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.templateId:ccdPlanOfCareActivityPlanned.root">
      <path value="Procedure.templateId.root"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <patternString value="2.16.840.1.113883.10.20.1.29"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.templateId:ccdPlanOfCareActivityPlannedRealised">
      <path value="Procedure.templateId"/>
      <sliceName value="ccdPlanOfCareActivityPlannedRealised"/>
      <short value="Conformité Procedure activity (CCD) si acte réalisée "/>
      <definition
                  value="Conformité Procedure activity (CCD) si acte réalisée"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.templateId:ccdPlanOfCareActivityPlannedRealised.root">
      <path value="Procedure.templateId.root"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <patternString value="2.16.840.1.113883.10.20.1.25"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.templateId:frActe">
      <path value="Procedure.templateId"/>
      <sliceName value="frActe"/>
      <short value="Conformité FR-Acte (CI-SIS)"/>
      <definition value="Conformité FR-Acte (CI-SIS)"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.templateId:frActe.root">
      <path value="Procedure.templateId.root"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <patternString value="1.2.250.1.213.1.1.3.62"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.classCode">
      <path value="Procedure.classCode"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.moodCode">
      <path value="Procedure.moodCode"/>
      <short
             value="- Si acte prévu : moodCode='INT' ; negationInd='false' (valeur par défaut) 
- Si acte réalisé : moodCode='EVN' ; negationInd='true' 
    - si l'acte n'a pas eu lieu : negationInd='false' 
    - si l'acte a eu lieu (valeur par défaut)"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.id">
      <path value="Procedure.id"/>
      <short value="Identifiant de l'entrée"/>
      <definition value="Identifiant de l'entrée"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.code">
      <path value="Procedure.code"/>
      <short
             value="Code d'acte : 

Aussi utilisé pour indiquer qu'il n'y a pas d'acte, ou qu'on ne sait pas s'il y en a.
Terminologie CCAM (1.2.250.1.215.300.1) si possible. 
Si l'acte n'est pas trouvé dans la terminologie CCAM, utiliser le code='C25218' displayName='Intervention' codeSystem='2.16.840.1.113883.3.26.1.1' codeSystemName='NCIT' et décrire l'acte sous forme de texte libre dans la partie narrative avec une référence vers l'entrée correspondante 
ou jdv-absent-or-unknown-procedure-cisis (1.2.250.1.213.1.1.5.665) pour les actes chirurgicaux"/>
      <definition value="Code d'acte"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.code.code">
      <path value="Procedure.code.code"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.code.codeSystem">
      <path value="Procedure.code.codeSystem"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.code.displayName">
      <path value="Procedure.code.displayName"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.text">
      <path value="Procedure.text"/>
      <short value="Description narrative de l'acte"/>
      <definition value="Description narrative de l'acte"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.text.reference">
      <path value="Procedure.text.reference"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.statusCode">
      <path value="Procedure.statusCode"/>
      <short
             value="Statut de l'acte : 

utiliser le jdv-hl7-v3-ActStatus-cisis (2.16.840.1.113883.1.11.15933 ) 
- Si l'acte a été réalisé : le statut prend la valeur 'completed'. 
- Si l'acte a été arrêté avant sa fin : le statut prend la valeur 'aborted'. 
- Si l'acte a été annulé avant sa réalisation : le statut prend la valeur 'cancelled'. 
- Si l'acte est en cours ou à venir : le statut prend la valeur 'active'."/>
      <definition value="Statut de l'acte"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="https://smt.esante.gouv.fr/fhir/ValueSet/jdv-hl7-v3-ActStatus-cisis"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.effectiveTime">
      <path value="Procedure.effectiveTime"/>
      <short
             value="Date de l'acte : 

- Si l'acte a été réalisé : l'élément 'effectiveTime' indique la date de réalisation. 
- Si l'acte a été annulé (statusCode 'Cancelled') ou arrêté (statusCode 'aborted'), l'élément 'effectiveTime' peut garder sa valeur initiale si elle était renseignée. 
- Si l'acte est prévu : l'élément 'effectiveTime' indique la date de planification si elle est connue ou la prend la valeur nullflavor='UNK' si elle n'est pas connue."/>
      <definition value="Date de l'acte"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.priorityCode">
      <path value="Procedure.priorityCode"/>
      <short
             value="Priorité : 
 
utiliser le jdv-hl7-v3-ActPriority-cisis (2.16.840.1.113883.1.11.16866) ou autre."/>
      <definition value="Priorité"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.approachSiteCode">
      <path value="Procedure.approachSiteCode"/>
      <short
             value="Voie d’abord : 

non renseigné si la voie d'abord est contenue dans le code de l'acte (comme c'est le cas avec la CCAM).
Sinon, utiliser la codification SNOMED CT (2.16.840.1.113883.6.96)"/>
      <definition value="Voie d’abord"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.approachSiteCode.qualifier">
      <path value="Procedure.approachSiteCode.qualifier"/>
      <short value="Latéralité SNOMED CT (2.16.840.1.113883.6.96) "/>
      <definition value="Latéralité"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.targetSiteCode">
      <path value="Procedure.targetSiteCode"/>
      <short
             value="Localisation anatomique SNOMED CT (2.16.840.1.113883.6.96)"/>
      <definition value="Localisation anatomique"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.targetSiteCode.originalText">
      <path value="Procedure.targetSiteCode.originalText"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.targetSiteCode.qualifier">
      <path value="Procedure.targetSiteCode.qualifier"/>
      <short value="Précision topographique"/>
      <definition value="Précision topographique"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.targetSiteCode.qualifier.name">
      <path value="Procedure.targetSiteCode.qualifier.name"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.targetSiteCode.qualifier.name.code">
      <path value="Procedure.targetSiteCode.qualifier.name.code"/>
      <patternCode value="106233006"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.targetSiteCode.qualifier.name.codeSystem">
      <path value="Procedure.targetSiteCode.qualifier.name.codeSystem"/>
      <patternString value="2.16.840.1.113883.6.96"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.targetSiteCode.qualifier.name.codeSystemName">
      <path value="Procedure.targetSiteCode.qualifier.name.codeSystemName"/>
      <patternString value="SNOMED-CT"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.targetSiteCode.qualifier.name.displayName">
      <path value="Procedure.targetSiteCode.qualifier.name.displayName"/>
      <patternString value="modificateur topographique"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.targetSiteCode.qualifier.value">
      <path value="Procedure.targetSiteCode.qualifier.value"/>
      <short value="Valeur de la topographie"/>
      <definition value="Valeur de la topographie"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.performer">
      <path value="Procedure.performer"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/Performer2"/>
        <profile
                 value="https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-performer-corps"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.author">
      <path value="Procedure.author"/>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/Author"/>
        <profile
                 value="https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-author"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.informant">
      <path value="Procedure.informant"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/Informant"/>
        <profile
                 value="https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-informant"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.participant">
      <path value="Procedure.participant"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/Participant2"/>
        <profile
                 value="https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-participant-corps"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.entryRelationship">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship"/>
      <slicing>
        <discriminator>
          <type value="value"/>
          <path value="$this"/>
        </discriminator>
        <rules value="open"/>
      </slicing>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterneCirconstances">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship"/>
      <sliceName value="frReferenceInterneCirconstances"/>
      <short value="Circonstances ayant décidé de l'acte"/>
      <definition value="Circonstances ayant décidé de l'acte"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterneCirconstances.typeCode">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.typeCode"/>
      <patternCode value="COMP"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterneCirconstances.inversionInd">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.inversionInd"/>
      <patternBoolean value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterneCirconstances.act">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.act"/>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/Act"/>
        <profile
                 value="https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-reference-interne"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterneMotifActe">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship"/>
      <sliceName value="frReferenceInterneMotifActe"/>
      <short value="Motif de l'acte"/>
      <definition value="Motif de l'acte"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterneMotifActe.typeCode">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.typeCode"/>
      <patternCode value="RSON"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterneMotifActe.inversionInd">
